sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68628" key="mono/ptuxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονό-πτῠχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68628.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">univalve</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄστρεον</foreign> Thom.Mag.<bibl n="http://www.trismegistos.org/text/23087" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.221</biblScope> </bibl> R.</sense> </entryFree>
